member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Maps.MapLatLngBounds
member.summary: Represents class.
member.example:
# [XAML](#tab/tabid-1)
<map:SfMaps> <map:SfMaps.Layer> <map:MapTileLayer UrlTemplate = "https://tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png" > <map:MapTileLayer.ZoomPanBehavior> <map:MapZoomPanBehavior ZoomLevel = "5" /> </map:MapTileLayer.ZoomPanBehavior> <map:MapTileLayer.LatLngBounds> <map:MapLatLngBounds> <map:MapLatLngBounds.Northeast> <map:MapLatLng> <x:Arguments> <x:Double>38.909804</x:Double> <x:Double>-77.043442</x:Double> </x:Arguments> </map:MapLatLng> </map:MapLatLngBounds.Northeast> <map:MapLatLngBounds.Southwest> <map:MapLatLng> <x:Arguments> <x:Double>13.048155</x:Double> <x:Double>80.083858</x:Double> </x:Arguments> </map:MapLatLng> </map:MapLatLngBounds.Southwest> </map:MapLatLngBounds> </map:MapTileLayer.LatLngBounds> </map:MapTileLayer> </map:SfMaps.Layer> </map:SfMaps>
# [C#](#tab/tabid-2)

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Maps.MapZoomPanBehavior
member.summary:
Enables zooming and panning in and .
Zooming and panning will start working when the new instance of is set to MapShapeLayer.MapZoomPanBehavior or MapTileLayer.MapZoomPanBehavior.
However, if you need to restrict pinch zooming or panning for any specific requirements, you can set the , and properties to false respectively.
The default value is 1 which will show the whole map in the viewport for and the available bounds for the .
The minimum and maximum zooming levels can be restricted using the and properties respectively. The default values of minZoomLevel and maxZoomLevel are 0 and 15 respectively.
However, for MapTileLayer, the maxZoomLevel may slightly vary depends on the providers. Check the respective official website of the map tile providers to know about the maximum zoom level it supports.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Maps.MapTileLayer
member.summary:
Tile layer which renders the tiles returned from the Web Map Tile Services (WMTS) like OpenStreetMap, Bing Maps, Google Maps, TomTom etc. The accepts the URL in WMTS format i.e. {z} — zoom level, {x} and {y} — tile coordinates.
We will replace the {z}, {x}, {y} internally based on the current center point and the zoom level.
Regarding the tile rendering, at the lowest zoom level (Level 0), the map is 256 x 256 pixels and the whole world map renders as a single tile. At each increase in level, the map width and height grow by a factor of 2 i.e. Level 1 is 512 x 512 pixels with 4 tiles ((0, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (1, 1) where 0 and 1 are {x} and {y} in urlTemplate), Level 2 is 2048 x 2048 pixels with 8 tiles (from (0, 0) to (3, 3)), and so on. (These details are just for your information and all these calculation are done internally.)
However, based on the size of the SfMaps control, initialZoomLevel number of initial tiles needed in the view port alone will be rendered. While zooming and panning, new tiles will be requested and rendered on demand based on the current zoom level.
The current zoom level can be obtained from the respectively. Once the particular tile is rendered, it will be stored in the cache and it will be used from it next time for better performance.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Maps.MapTileLayer.LatLngBounds
member.summary: Gets or sets the southwest and northeast geo-points to calculate auto zoom level.
member.value: The latitude and longitude bounds of map. The default is null.
member.remarks: will work based upon the .
member.example:
# [XAML](#tab/tabid-1)
<map:SfMaps> <map:SfMaps.Layer> <map:MapTileLayer UrlTemplate = "https://tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png" > <map:MapTileLayer.LatLngBounds> <map:MapLatLngBounds> <map:MapLatLngBounds.Northeast> <map:MapLatLng> <x:Arguments> <x:Double>38.909804</x:Double> <x:Double>-77.043442</x:Double> </x:Arguments> </map:MapLatLng> </map:MapLatLngBounds.Northeast> <map:MapLatLngBounds.Southwest> <map:MapLatLng> <x:Arguments> <x:Double>13.048155</x:Double> <x:Double>80.083858</x:Double> </x:Arguments> </map:MapLatLng> </map:MapLatLngBounds.Southwest> </map:MapLatLngBounds> </map:MapTileLayer.LatLngBounds> </map:MapTileLayer> </map:SfMaps.Layer> </map:SfMaps>
# [C#](#tab/tabid-2)
SfMaps map = new SfMaps(); MapTileLayer tileLayer = new MapTileLayer(); tileLayer.UrlTemplate = "https://tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png"; MapLatLngBounds bounds = new MapLatLngBounds(); bounds.Northeast = new MapLatLng(38.909804, -77.043442); bounds.Southwest = new MapLatLng(13.048155, 80.083858); tileLayer.LatLngBounds = bounds; map.Layer = tileLayer; this.Content = map;
***

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Maps.SfMaps
member.summary:
Maps is a powerful data visualization component that displays statistical information for a geographical area. It has highly interactive and customizable features such as selection, tooltip, legends, markers, bubbles, and color mapping. Users can generate maps for population density, sales, political boundaries, weather, elections, and routes.
The is contains or as a content of Maps.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Maps.MapShapeLayer
member.summary:
The shape layer in which geographical rendering is done.
The actual geographical rendering is done here using the property. The shape source can be set as the GeoJSON file or shapefile from the local file, URL, Stream or Resource.
The property is used to refer the unique field name in the GeoJSON file or shapefile to identify each shapes and map with the respective data in the data source.
By default, the value specified for the in the GeoJSON or shapefile will be used in the elements like data labels, tooltip, and legend for their respective shapes.
However, it is possible to keep a data source and customize these elements based on the requirement. The value of the will be used to map with the respective data returned in from the data source.
Once the above mapping is done, you can customize the elements data label, color mapping etc.

member.summary: Gets or sets primary value for the data in the collection.
member.value: The primary value path of the . The default value is string.Empty.
member.remarks: This primary value will be mapped with the value in the respective shape detail in the GeoJSON file or shapefile. This mapping will then be used in the rendering of bubbles, data labels, shape colors, tooltip in their respective shape's coordinates.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Maps.MapShapeLayer.ShapeColorValuePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the field value to be fetched from data for each shape used to determine the shape color in the shape layer of the maps.
member.value: The color value path of shapes. The default value is string.Empty.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Maps.MapShapeLayer.ColorMappings
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of which specifes shape's color based on the data.
member.value: ObservableCollection of . The default value is empty collection.

remarks.para: It provides option to set the shape color based on the specific or the range of values which falls between and .
Based on the values, legend items will be rendered. The text of legend item will be of the .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Maps.MapShapeLayer.Legend
member.summary: Gets or sets the map legend to convey clear information on data plotted in the map using shape and bubble colors.
member.value: The map legend for shape or bubble. The default is null.

remarks.para: Information provided in the legend helps to identify the data rendered in the map shapes or bubbles.
Set to to show legend for shapes.
If is provided, then and will be used for the legend item's icon and the legend item's text respectively.
Set to to show legend for bubbles.
If is provided, then and will be used for the legend item's icon and the legend item's text respectively.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Maps.MapShapeSublayer
member.summary:
The shape sub layer for and .
The actual geographical rendering is done here using the property. The shape source can be set as the GeoJSON file or shapefile from the local file, URL, Stream or Resource.
The property is used to refer the unique field name in the GeoJSON file or shapefile to identify each shapes and map with the respective data in the data source.
By default, the value specified for the in the GeoJSON or shapefile will be used in the elements like data labels, tooltip, and legend for their respective shapes.
However, it is possible to keep a data source and customize these elements based on the requirement. The value of the will be used to map with the respective data returned in from the data source.
Once the above mapping is done, you can customize the elements data label, color mapping etc.

member.remarks: It is used to refer the field name in the GeoJSON file or shapefile to identify each shape and map that shape with the respective data in the data source.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Maps.MapShapeSublayer.PrimaryValuePath
member.summary: Gets or sets primary value for the data in the collection.
member.value: The primary value path of the . The default value is string.Empty.
member.remarks: This primary value will be mapped with the value in the respective shape detail in the GeoJSON file or shapefile. This mapping will then be used in the rendering of bubbles, data labels, shape colors, tooltip in their respective shape's coordinates.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Maps.MapShapeSublayer.ShapeColorValuePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the field value to be fetched from data for each shape used to determine the shape color in the shape layer of the maps.
member.value: The color value path of shapes. The default value is string.Empty.
member.remarks: If the field represents direct color value, then the color is applied to shape; otherwise, the shape color applied based on the specific or the range of values which falls between and in the .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Maps.MapShapeSublayer.ColorMappings
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of which specifes shape's color based on the data.
member.value: ObservableCollection of . The default value is empty collection.

remarks.para: It provides option to set the shape color based on the specific or the range of values which falls between and .
Based on the values, legend items will be rendered. The text of legend item will be of the .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Maps.MapShapeSublayer.ShowDataLabels
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether data labels will be showed or not.
member.value: true if the data labels shown; otherwise, false. The default value is false.
member.remarks: decides whether the data labels to be shown or not.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Maps.MapShapeSublayer.DataLabelSettings
member.summary: Gets or sets the data label settings to customizing the data labels of map shapes.
member.value: The data label settings. The default is null.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Maps.MapShapeSublayer.BubbleSettings
member.summary: Gets or sets the map bubble settings to customizing the bubbles of map shapes.
member.value: The bubble settings. The default is null.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Maps.MapShapeSublayer.ShowBubbles
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether bubbles will be showed or not.
member.value: true if shown bubbles; otherwise, false. The default value is false.
member.remarks: decides whether the bubbles to be shown or not.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Maps.MapShapeSublayer.SelectedShapeFill
member.summary: Gets or sets the brush that paints the interior of the selected shape.
member.value: A Brush that specifies how the map selected shape interior is painted.
member.remarks: * If is , then the selection effect will be disabled. * If is null, then the saturated color will be applied when selecting the shape.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Maps.MapShapeSublayer.SelectedShapeStroke
member.summary: Gets or sets the Brush that specifies how the selected shape outline to be painted.

member.summary: Gets or sets the value that specifies the width of the selected shape stroke outline.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Maps.MapShapeSublayer.EnableSelection
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicate whether the selection is enabled or not.
member.value: true if shape selection is enabled; otherwise, false. The default value is false.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Maps.MapShapeSublayer.ShapeHoverFill
member.summary: Gets or sets the Brush that paints the interior of the mouse hovered shape on desktop.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Maps.ShapeReader.ReadHeader(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Reads and parses the header of the .shp index file
member.remarks: Byte Position Field Value Type Order ----------------------------------------------------- Byte 0 File Code 9994 Integer Big Byte 4 Unused 0 Integer Big Byte 8 Unused 0 Integer Big Byte 12 Unused 0 Integer Big Byte 16 Unused 0 Integer Big Byte 20 Unused 0 Integer Big Byte 24 File Length File Length Integer Big Byte 28 Version 1000 Integer Little Byte 32 Shape Type Shape Type Integer Little Byte 36 Bounding Box Xmin Double Little Byte 44 Bounding Box Ymin Double Little Byte 52 Bounding Box Xmax Double Little Byte 60 Bounding Box Ymax Double Little Byte 68* Bounding Box Zmin Double Little Byte 76* Bounding Box Zmax Double Little Byte 84* Bounding Box Mmin Double Little Byte 92* Bounding Box Mmax Double Little * Unused, with value 0.0, if not Measured or Z type The "Integer" type corresponds to the CLS Int32 type, and "Double" to CLS Double (IEEE 754).

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Maps.MapPolyline
member.summary: The represents the default model for polyline layer.
member.example:
# [XAML](#tab/tabid-1)
<map:SfMaps> <map:SfMaps.Layer> <map:MapShapeLayer ShapesSource = "https://cdn.syncfusion.com/maps/map-data/india.json"> <map:MapShapeLayer.Sublayers> <map:MapPolylineLayer> <map:MapPolylineLayer.Polylines> <map:MapPolyline StrokeThickness="4"> <map:MapPolyline.Points> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="13.0827" Longitude="80.2707" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="13.1746" Longitude="79.6117" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="13.6373" Longitude="79.5037" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="14.4673" Longitude="78.8242" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="14.9091" Longitude="78.0092" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="16.2160" Longitude="77.3566" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="17.1557" Longitude="76.8697" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="18.0975" Longitude="75.4249" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="18.5204" Longitude="73.8567" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="19.0760" Longitude="72.8777" /> </map:MapPolyline.Points> <map:MapPolyline.StrokeDashArray> <DoubleCollection> <x:Double>2</x:Double> <x:Double>2</x:Double> <x:Double>0.1</x:Double> <x:Double>2</x:Double> </DoubleCollection> </map:MapPolyline.StrokeDashArray> </map:MapPolyline> </map:MapPolylineLayer.Polylines> </map:MapPolylineLayer> </map:MapShapeLayer.Sublayers> </map:MapShapeLayer> </map:SfMaps.Layer> </map:SfMaps>
# [C#](#tab/tabid-2)
SfMaps maps = new SfMaps(); MapShapeLayer layer = new MapShapeLayer(); layer.ShapesSource = MapSource.FromUri(new Uri("https://cdn.syncfusion.com/maps/map-data/india.json")); MapPolylineLayer mapPolylineLayer = new MapPolylineLayer(); MapPolyline polyline = new MapPolyline(); polyline.Points = new ObservableCollection<MapLatLng>() { new MapLatLng(13.0827, 80.2707), new MapLatLng(13.1746, 79.6117), new MapLatLng(13.6373, 79.5037), new MapLatLng(14.4673, 78.8242), new MapLatLng(14.9091, 78.0092), new MapLatLng(16.2160, 77.3566), new MapLatLng(17.1557, 76.8697), new MapLatLng(18.0975, 75.4249), new MapLatLng(18.5204, 73.8567), new MapLatLng(19.0760, 72.8777) }; polyline.StrokeThickness = 4; polyline.StrokeLineCap = LineCap.Round; polyline.Stroke = Brush.Blue; polyline.StrokeDashArray = new double[] { 2, 2, 0.1, 2 }; mapPolylineLayer.Polylines.Add(polyline); layer.Sublayers.Add(mapPolylineLayer); maps.Layer = layer; this.Content = maps;
***

SfMaps maps = new SfMaps(); MapShapeLayer layer = new MapShapeLayer(); layer.ShapesSource = MapSource.FromUri(new Uri("https://cdn.syncfusion.com/maps/map-data/india.json")); MapPolylineLayer mapPolylineLayer = new MapPolylineLayer(); MapPolyline polyline = new MapPolyline(); polyline.Points = new ObservableCollection<MapLatLng>() { new MapLatLng(13.0827, 80.2707), new MapLatLng(13.1746, 79.6117), new MapLatLng(13.6373, 79.5037), new MapLatLng(14.4673, 78.8242), new MapLatLng(14.9091, 78.0092), new MapLatLng(16.2160, 77.3566), new MapLatLng(17.1557, 76.8697), new MapLatLng(18.0975, 75.4249), new MapLatLng(18.5204, 73.8567), new MapLatLng(19.0760, 72.8777) }; mapPolylineLayer.Polylines.Add(polyline); layer.Sublayers.Add(mapPolylineLayer); maps.Layer = layer; this.Content = maps;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Maps.MapPolylineLayer.AnimationEasing
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies the polylines animation easing effect.
member.value: The default value is .

# [XAML](#tab/tabid-1)
<map:SfMaps> <map:SfMaps.Layer> <map:MapShapeLayer ShapesSource = "https://cdn.syncfusion.com/maps/map-data/india.json"> <map:MapShapeLayer.Sublayers> <map:MapPolylineLayer AnimationEasing="{x:Static Easing.Linear}"> <map:MapPolylineLayer.Polylines> <map:MapPolyline StrokeThickness = "4"> <map:MapPolyline.Points> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="13.0827" Longitude="80.2707" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="13.1746" Longitude="79.6117" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="13.6373" Longitude="79.5037" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="14.4673" Longitude="78.8242" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="14.9091" Longitude="78.0092" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="16.2160" Longitude="77.3566" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="17.1557" Longitude="76.8697" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="18.0975" Longitude="75.4249" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="18.5204" Longitude="73.8567" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="19.0760" Longitude="72.8777" /> </map:MapPolyline.Points> <map:MapPolyline.StrokeDashArray> <DoubleCollection> <x:Double>2</x:Double> <x:Double>2</x:Double> <x:Double>0.1</x:Double> <x:Double>2</x:Double> </DoubleCollection> </map:MapPolyline.StrokeDashArray> </map:MapPolyline> </map:MapPolylineLayer.Polylines> </map:MapPolylineLayer> </map:MapShapeLayer.Sublayers> </map:MapShapeLayer> </map:SfMaps.Layer> </map:SfMaps>

SfMaps maps = new SfMaps(); MapShapeLayer layer = new MapShapeLayer(); layer.ShapesSource = MapSource.FromUri(new Uri("https://cdn.syncfusion.com/maps/map-data/india.json")); MapPolylineLayer mapPolylineLayer = new MapPolylineLayer(); mapPolylineLayer.AnimationEasing = Easing.Linear; MapPolyline polyline = new MapPolyline(); polyline.Points = new ObservableCollection<MapLatLng>() { new MapLatLng(13.0827, 80.2707), new MapLatLng(13.1746, 79.6117), new MapLatLng(13.6373, 79.5037), new MapLatLng(14.4673, 78.8242), new MapLatLng(14.9091, 78.0092), new MapLatLng(16.2160, 77.3566), new MapLatLng(17.1557, 76.8697), new MapLatLng(18.0975, 75.4249), new MapLatLng(18.5204, 73.8567), new MapLatLng(19.0760, 72.8777) }; mapPolylineLayer.Polylines.Add(polyline); layer.Sublayers.Add(mapPolylineLayer); maps.Layer = layer; this.Content = maps;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Maps.MapPolylineLayer.AnimationDuration
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that specifies the polylines animation duration in milliseconds.
member.value: The default value is 0 milliseconds.
member.example:
# [XAML](#tab/tabid-1)
<map:SfMaps> <map:SfMaps.Layer> <map:MapShapeLayer ShapesSource = "https://cdn.syncfusion.com/maps/map-data/india.json"> <map:MapShapeLayer.Sublayers> <map:MapPolylineLayer AnimationEasing="{x:Static Easing.Linear}" AnimationDuration="5000" > <map:MapPolylineLayer.Polylines> <map:MapPolyline StrokeThickness = "4"> <map:MapPolyline.Points> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="13.0827" Longitude="80.2707" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="13.1746" Longitude="79.6117" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="13.6373" Longitude="79.5037" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="14.4673" Longitude="78.8242" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="14.9091" Longitude="78.0092" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="16.2160" Longitude="77.3566" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="17.1557" Longitude="76.8697" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="18.0975" Longitude="75.4249" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="18.5204" Longitude="73.8567" /> <map:MapLatLng Latitude="19.0760" Longitude="72.8777" /> </map:MapPolyline.Points> <map:MapPolyline.StrokeDashArray> <DoubleCollection> <x:Double>2</x:Double> <x:Double>2</x:Double> <x:Double>0.1</x:Double> <x:Double>2</x:Double> </DoubleCollection> </map:MapPolyline.StrokeDashArray> </map:MapPolyline> </map:MapPolylineLayer.Polylines> </map:MapPolylineLayer> </map:MapShapeLayer.Sublayers> </map:MapShapeLayer> </map:SfMaps.Layer> </map:SfMaps>
# [C#](#tab/tabid-2)
SfMaps maps = new SfMaps(); MapShapeLayer layer = new MapShapeLayer(); layer.ShapesSource = MapSource.FromUri(new Uri("https://cdn.syncfusion.com/maps/map-data/india.json")); MapPolylineLayer mapPolylineLayer = new MapPolylineLayer(); mapPolylineLayer.AnimationDuration = 5000; MapPolyline polyline = new MapPolyline(); polyline.Points = new ObservableCollection<MapLatLng>() { new MapLatLng(13.0827, 80.2707), new MapLatLng(13.1746, 79.6117), new MapLatLng(13.6373, 79.5037), new MapLatLng(14.4673, 78.8242), new MapLatLng(14.9091, 78.0092), new MapLatLng(16.2160, 77.3566), new MapLatLng(17.1557, 76.8697), new MapLatLng(18.0975, 75.4249), new MapLatLng(18.5204, 73.8567), new MapLatLng(19.0760, 72.8777) }; mapPolylineLayer.Polylines.Add(polyline); layer.Sublayers.Add(mapPolylineLayer); maps.Layer = layer; this.Content = maps;
